notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Javier Sanoja. Marcus Semien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Graham Pauley. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens lines out to center fielder Jakob Marsee.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández hits a grand slam (2) to center field. Esteury Ruiz scores. Liam Hicks scores. Xavier Edwards scores.
